title: phlegmariurus cavifolius
intro: Phlegmariurus cavifolius, also known as the cluster spike moss, is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from the plant, which are used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
